content: Eval scenario structure: scenario.yaml (description required, timeout_ms optional default 300000, config_overrides optional, startup_actions optional list of {command, description}), assertions.yaml (assertions list required, min 1), repo-template/ optional dir. Assertion kinds: min_workers_spawned, no_zombies, merge_queue_empty, tasks_completed, max_stall_rate, max_cost, max_duration_ms, custom. Each assertion: kind, expected (number|boolean|string), label (optional).
